evidence.source_title: Hossein Mousavi Tabrizi: From Engineering Massacres to Wearing the Reformist Mantle
evidence.description: Mousavi Tabrizi presided over the Cinema Rex fire trial (Aug–Sep 1980), sentencing Hossein Takbalizadeh and others to death in proceedings where the actual perpetrators were never summoned.

editorial_notes: Used 'directed' to indicate he directed/presided over the trial proceedings, not the fire itself.
